evals.prompt: Create a line chart showing YC startup funding trends from 2015-2024. The key insight is that early-stage rounds dropped 40% in 2023.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a D3+React responsive line chart with: title, subtitle stating the insight, direct labels, muted secondary data, accessible SVG structure, and prefers-reduced-motion support.
assertions: Uses D3 for scales/math and React/JSX for SVG rendering (not d3.select().append())
Includes a subtitle that states the insight, not just the topic
Has aria-label with the actual insight on the SVG element
Includes role='img', <title>, and <desc> for accessibility
Uses useResizeObserver or ResizeObserver for responsive sizing
Wraps animations in prefers-reduced-motion check

evals.prompt: I need a scrollytelling visualization that walks through how startup mortality rates change by industry sector.
evals.expected_output: Should produce a ScrollySection component using Scrollama with sticky chart, step-based text, and progressive revelation of data layers.
assertions: Uses Scrollama for intersection-observer-based step detection
Chart container uses CSS position: sticky
Each scroll step changes ONE visual element
Follows narrative arc: setup, tension, resolution
Includes opacity transitions for active vs inactive steps
Chart is a 'use client' component

evals.prompt: Build a choropleth map showing startup density by US state.
evals.expected_output: Should use D3-geo with TopoJSON, sequential color scale, and full accessibility.
assertions: Uses TopoJSON (not GeoJSON) for map data
Uses d3.geoAlbersUsa() projection for US maps
Color scale is sequential single-hue (not rainbow)
Includes hidden data table with sr-only class for screen readers
SVG has role='img' and aria-label with the insight
Uses viewBox for responsive sizing

evals.prompt: I want to show how founder backgrounds correlate with startup success. What chart should I use?
evals.expected_output: Should recommend a scatter plot as the default for correlation stories, with connected scatter as an upgrade if time dimension is relevant.
assertions: Identifies the story type as 'Correlation'
Recommends scatter plot as default chart type
Mentions connected scatter plot as upgrade option for adding time dimension
Asks the user to state the single insight before writing code
Suggests fewer than 5 categorical hues if color-coding categories

evals.prompt: Generate an editorial illustration for a data story about AI replacing startup jobs using fal.ai.
evals.expected_output: Should use @fal-ai/client with FAL_API_KEY env var, FLUX Schnell model, and explicitly note this is for illustration not charts.
assertions: Uses process.env.FAL_API_KEY (not FAL_KEY)
Uses fal-ai/flux/schnell or another supported model
Prompt specifies no text, no charts, no graphs in the image
Includes Cache-Control headers for caching the result
Makes clear that fal.ai is for editorial illustrations, never for chart generation
